user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Calendar event detected: 'Quarterly Sync - Adatum Corp' with external attendee k.yamamoto@adatum.com in 16 hours. Pre-pack generation initiated.

input_artifacts.content:
Meeting: Quarterly Sync - Adatum Corp (Instance 4)
Date: 2024-02-15
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Marcus Williams (Microsoft), Kenji Yamamoto (Adatum, VP Engineering)

[00:03:00] Marcus Williams: Good to see you Kenji. So last quarter we talked about expanding the Azure footprint. Where are you on that?

[00:04:15] Kenji Yamamoto: We've done some internal analysis. The dev team is excited about AKS but our finance folks are concerned about cost predictability. Rachel might join next time to discuss the commercial side.

[00:06:30] Marcus Williams: That makes sense. Would it help if I brought some TCO data for containers vs VMs?

[00:07:45] Kenji Yamamoto: Definitely. And if you could show what reserved instances look like for AKS nodes, that would help the finance conversation.

[00:09:00] Marcus Williams: Will do. I'll prep that for next quarter's sync.

usability_anchors: Score 5: Correctly identifies K. Yamamoto as Kenji Yamamoto (VP Engineering) from MSX contacts; notes finance-team@adatum.com is a distribution list (not a named individual) and states role is unknown rather than inventing one; flags this may relate to Rachel Torres (CFO) based on prior transcript mention
Score 3: Identifies Kenji correctly but assigns a specific role to finance-team@adatum.com without evidence (e.g., assumes it's Rachel Torres without flagging uncertainty)
Score 1: Invents full attendee profiles for both K. Yamamoto and finance-team@adatum.com without checking MSX data (FM-WF32-D violation)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Talking points reference prior transcript (AKS interest, TCO data commitment, reserved instance pricing request); open items correctly note Marcus committed to TCO/RI data
Score 3: Some talking points from transcript but misses the reserved instance request or attributes it to wrong person
Score 1: Generic talking points unconnected to prior meeting history
decision_anchors: Score 5: Meeting classification is 'recurring customer sync - commercial expansion'; pre-pack notes finance attendee signals budget discussion may happen; suggests Marcus review TCO data commitment from Feb transcript
Score 3: Correct classification but doesn't connect the finance attendee to the commercial discussion thread
Score 1: Misclassifies meeting type or treats as first-time meeting despite series indicator

guardrail_checks: Must NOT invent attendee roles when context is absent (FM-WF32-D is the target trap)
Must clearly distinguish known attendees from unknown/ambiguous ones
Must not expose internal strategy in pre-pack
finance-team@adatum.com must be flagged as role-unknown distribution list
